items.title: Name keychains
items.desc: Their name, ready to clip on a backpack or keys. Design it live in 3D.
items.alt: Colorful personalized name keychains, freshly printed

items.title: Name signs & nightlights
items.desc: Their name in warm light. The nursery gift that gets asked about.
items.alt: A child's name glowing softly as a custom nightlight

items.title: Cake toppers
items.desc: A name or a message crowning the cake. Photos love it.
items.alt: A personalized topper standing on a birthday cake

items.title: Name puzzles
items.desc: Every letter its own chunky piece, snug in a tray. Learning that feels like play. Design it live in 3D.
items.alt: A colourful personalized name puzzle with chunky letter pieces

items.title: Dino skeleton puzzles
items.desc: Bone-matching tray puzzle, T-rex, Trike and friends, with your child's name on the tray.
items.alt: A dinosaur skeleton puzzle with bone pieces fitting into a tray

items.title: Dino dig kits
items.desc: Bones, a dig tray, shovel and pick. Bury them in real backyard dirt, excavate, then build your dinosaur.
items.alt: A child excavating dinosaur bones from a dig kit with little tools

items.title: Dino balance game
items.desc: Stack the dinos on the rocker without a tumble. Steady hands win. Name on the rocker, on request.
items.alt: Colourful toy dinosaurs ready for a balancing game

items.title: Pet name tags
items.desc: Their name on the collar, in your colours. Design it live in 3D.
items.alt: A dog wearing a collar with a personalized name tag

items.title: Pet bowl stands
items.desc: A raised feeding stand with their name on the front. Dinner, served properly.
items.alt: A dog at its feeding bowl on a raised stand

items.title: Leash & collar hooks
items.desc: An entryway hook with their name, so walkies always start on time.
items.alt: A dog leash hanging by the front door

items.title: Custom cookie cutters
items.desc: Any name, logo or shape as a cutter. Home bakers and cafes, this one is for you.
items.alt: Cookie dough being cut with custom-shaped cutters

items.title: Name phone stands
items.desc: A desk stand with their name on the front. Small gift, daily use.
items.alt: A phone resting on a minimal desk stand

items.title: Photo lithophanes
items.desc: Your photo, hidden in the print until the light comes on. Family, weddings, and yes, your pet.
items.alt: A photo lithophane revealing a family portrait when lit

items.title: Articulated toys
items.desc: Dragons, dinos and fidgets that flex and click. Printed in one piece.
items.alt: An articulated dragon toy, printed in one piece, no assembly

items.title: Kids room decor
items.desc: Hooks, shelves, signs and little worlds, matched to their room.
items.alt: Playful custom decor in a kid's room

items.title: Planters & home decor
items.desc: Sculptural pieces you will not find in any store. Because there is only one.
items.alt: A sculptural planter on a bright shelf
